title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. The model reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 on drug design tasks including toxicity prediction, antibody generation, and identifying new therapeutic molecules.
